events.name: Famine
events.description: Crops have failed. Food production severely reduced.

events.name: Plague
events.description: A terrible disease swept through. Population decreased.

events.name: Bandit Attack
events.description: Bandits raided the village and stole resources.

events.name: Bumper Harvest
events.description: An excellent growing season produced extra food.

events.name: Gold Rush
events.description: Miners struck a rich vein! Bonus gold collected.

events.name: Rebellion
events.description: Unhappy citizens revolted. Morale dropped sharply.

events.name: Festival
events.description: A grand festival was held! The people are happy.

events.name: Trade Route Disrupted
events.description: Bandits blocked trade routes. Trade paused this turn.

events.name: Wandering Trader
events.description: A mysterious merchant arrived with rare goods!

events.name: Migration
events.description: Refugees arrived seeking shelter. Population increased!
